input.name: Dashboard and auth UI
input.overview: Replace the top navigation dashboard chrome with a two-column shell (sidebar + main) that matches your Programs-home mock, keep routes aligned with the take-home (`/programs`, `/import`, `/audit`), and restyle all auth pages to match the sign-in mock with a shared layout.
input.plan:
# Programs dashboard shell + auth visual refresh

## Answers up front

**Yes — this design fits the dashboard.** Today the dashboard group uses a horizontal [`Navbar`](frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx) inside [`(dashboard)/layout.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx); you will swap that for a fixed-width left sidebar + scrollable main area with light gray page background and white bordered cards, matching your reference.

**Naming:** Treat the mock’s “Dashboard” item as **Programs** — same primary surface as today’s [`/programs`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/programs/page.tsx), not a separate `/dashboard` route. No need to rename URLs unless you later want `/` → `/programs` explicitly (already handled by [`HomeRedirect`](frontend/src/components/auth/HomeRedirect.tsx)).

### Recommended left menu (for this repo’s scope)

Keep the sidebar lean and aligned with real routes:

| Item | Route | Why |
|------|-------|-----|
| **Programs** | `/programs` | Home/overview: greeting, stat cards, “Your programs” list (your mock). |
| **Import** | `/import` | CSV bulk import is a rubric deliverable — must stay discoverable. |
| **Audit log** | `/audit` | Required admin surface; label can read “Audit log” to match the mock. |

**Intentionally not in the sidebar (matches the mock):** “New program” works better as a **primary button** in the main header next to “Your programs” (or beside the page title), not as a permanent nav row — avoids duplicating `/programs/new` vs list semantics.

**User block in the sidebar:** Backend [`GET /api/auth/me`](backend/src/modules/auth/auth.controller.ts) returns `{ id, email }` only. Plan: fetch once in a small client hook or sidebar wrapper; display **initials derived from email** (e.g. `maya@…` → `M`, or first two letters of local part) and fixed role **Creator** until a display name exists in the API.

**Last activity stat:** Easiest zero-backend approach: derive “last activity” from the **latest `program.createdAt`** in the already-loaded programs list (or “—” if empty). Optional follow-up: add a `limit` query to the audit list API if you want true “last admin action” without loading 500 rows.

---

## Implementation plan

### 1. Dashboard layout: sidebar shell

- Add a dedicated layout component (e.g. `AppSidebar` + `DashboardShell`) under [`frontend/src/components/layout/`](frontend/src/components/layout/) that provides:
  - Left: white sidebar, right border, **WELLSPRING** brand (reuse/extend [`AppBrandLink`](frontend/src/components/auth/AppBrandLink.tsx) or a shared `BrandMark` text style: uppercase, letter-spacing).
  - Profile block: avatar circle, email-based initials, “Creator”.
  - Nav links with `lucide-react` icons and **active state** using existing CSS variables (`--accent` / `--sidebar-accent` in [`globals.css`](frontend/src/app/globals.css) are already sage-tinted; tune if the active pill needs to match `#5f715a`-family exactly).
  - Bottom: reuse [`LogoutButton`](frontend/src/components/layout/LogoutButton.tsx).
- Wire with `usePathname()` from `next/navigation` to highlight `/programs`, `/import`, `/audit` (consider `pathname.startsWith('/programs')` for deep links).
- Replace `Navbar` usage in [`(dashboard)/layout.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx): `ProtectedLayout` → shell → `{children}` in a **wide main column** (`max-w-*` optional; mock is full-width friendly).

### 2. Programs home page: match the mock’s content blocks

Refactor [`programs/page.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/programs/page.tsx) while preserving data loading, banners, delete dialog, and links:

- **Header:** “Welcome back, {first name or local part of email}.” + subtitle (“Here’s what’s happening across your programs today.”).
- **Three stat cards:** total programs; total sessions (`sum` of `sessionCount`); last activity (relative time from latest `createdAt` or placeholder).
- **“Your programs” card:** header row with title + “View all →” (can link to `#` or `/programs` anchor) + table-like rows: title, “N sessions”, right-aligned “View →” to program detail/sessions route (keep existing destinations from current list).

Sub-routes (`/programs/new`, `/programs/[id]/edit`, session pages) keep the same sidebar; they can use a simpler page header without the full stat grid.

### 3. Auth: shared shell for all routes (per your choice)

You selected **all auth routes** — apply one visual system:

- Update [`(auth)/layout.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(auth)/layout.tsx):
  - Page background: very light gray (use `bg-muted/30` or a dedicated class consistent with mock).
  - Centered **WELLSPRING** above the card (not inside the card if matching the sign-in image).
  - Card: white, thin border, rounded; **no heavy shadow** (drop or soften `shadow-sm` from current layout).
  - Below card: footer line “New creator? **Create your account →**” on login; sibling pages get equivalent links (e.g. “Already have an account? Sign in →”).
  - Footer: `© 2026 Wellspring` (or product string you prefer).

- **Login** [`(auth)/login/page.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx):
  - [`AuthPageHeader`](frontend/src/components/auth/AuthPageHeader.tsx): title **Welcome back**; description **Sign in to manage your wellness content.**
  - Move **Forgot password?** to a **right-aligned** row under the password field (mock); keep route to `/forgot-password`.
  - Primary button label **Sign in**; use `Button` with `bg-primary` / existing primary token (tune `--primary` in `globals.css` toward ~`#5f715a` if contrast checks pass).
  - Remove or relocate the mid-page “Create account · Forgot password” row in favor of layout footer + forgot link placement.

- **Signup, forgot password, reset password** pages under [`(auth)/`](frontend/src/app/(auth)/): same card width, typography, and footer pattern; adjust headings/descriptions only where needed so each page still reads correctly.

- **Brand component:** Update [`AppBrandLink`](frontend/src/components/auth/AppBrandLink.tsx) (or split display vs link) so auth + sidebar show **WELLSPRING** styling while keeping correct `href` behavior for authed vs unauthed.

### 4. Polish and consistency

- Ensure [`AuthTextField`](frontend/src/components/auth/AuthTextField.tsx) borders/radius feel like the mock (light gray border, rounded inputs).
- Quick pass on [`audit/page.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/audit/page.tsx) and [`import/page.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/import/page.tsx): page title spacing so they sit cleanly under the new shell (no duplicate “Wellspring Admin” top bar).

### 5. Verification

- Run `pnpm test` / `pnpm lint` in `frontend` as you normally do.
- Manually click: Programs → sessions, Import, Audit, Logout; login → programs; signup/forgot/reset flows still submit.

---

## Architecture (after change)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  subgraph dash [Dashboard route group]
    Layout[Dashboard layout shell]
    Sidebar[AppSidebar nav]
    Main[Page content]
    Layout --> Sidebar
    Layout --> Main
  end
  subgraph auth [Auth route group]
    AuthLayout[Auth layout]
    AuthCard[Centered card]
    AuthLayout --> AuthCard
  end
```

No backend changes required for the baseline; optional later: `limit` on audit query for accurate “last activity.”

content.text:
Here’s what was implemented:

### Dashboard shell
- **`DashboardShell`** ([`frontend/src/components/layout/DashboardShell.tsx`](frontend/src/components/layout/DashboardShell.tsx)) loads **`/auth/me`**, exposes email via **`CreatorProvider`** ([`frontend/src/components/layout/creatorContext.tsx`](frontend/src/components/layout/creatorContext.tsx)), and lays out **`AppSidebar`** + scrollable main.
- **`AppSidebar`** ([`frontend/src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`](frontend/src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx)): **WELLSPRING** brand, avatar initials, display name from email local-part, **Creator**, nav for **Programs** / **Import** / **Audit log** (active states + icons), full-width **Log out**.
- **[`(dashboard)/layout.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx)** uses the shell instead of the top **`Navbar`**.

### Programs home
- **[`programs/page.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/programs/page.tsx)**: welcome line (with name from creator context), subtitle, **Total programs** / **Total sessions** / **Last activity** (from latest `program.createdAt` via [`formatRelativeShort`](frontend/src/lib/formatDisplay.ts)), **Your programs** card with **View all →** and **New program**, rows with **View →** plus existing **Edit** / **Delete** and confirm dialog.

### Auth
- **`AuthChrome`** ([`frontend/src/components/auth/AuthChrome.tsx`](frontend/src/components/auth/AuthChrome.tsx)): light page background, brand above the card, bordered card (no strong shadow), path-based footer links, **© 2026 Wellspring**.
- **[`(auth)/layout.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(auth)/layout.tsx)** only renders **`AuthChrome`**.
- **Login**: “Welcome back”, wellness subtitle, **Forgot password?** right-aligned under password, **Sign in** CTA; footer via chrome.
- **Signup / forgot / reset**: duplicate footers removed; shared chrome footers; button height/copy aligned.
- **`AppBrandLink`**: **Wellspring**, uppercase + letter-spacing.
- **`globals.css`**: primary adjusted toward **~#5f715a**; focus ring on auth inputs updated to match.

### Subpages
- **Import**, **Audit**, **programs/new**, **programs/[id]/edit**, **sessions**: clearer headers / spacing / “Back to programs” / table shell on audit.

### Other
- **`LogoutButton`** accepts optional **`className`**.
- Document title set to **Wellspring** in [`layout.tsx`](frontend/src/app/layout.tsx).

**Verification:** `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm test` all pass in `frontend/`.

All related todos are **completed**.

input.description: Run ESLint and TypeScript check on frontend

content.text:
Here’s how your Chrome export compares to the app, and what was updated.

### What the export defines (from `Sign in — Wellspring.html` + bundled CSS)

| Token / rule | In export (`:root` / markup) |
|--------------|------------------------------|
| Page | `min-h-screen`, centered column, `px-5 py-10`, **`bg-background`** |
| Brand | **`text-[15px]`**, **`tracking-[0.18em]`**, semibold, uppercase, **`mb-8`** |
| Card | **`max-w-[420px]`**, `rounded-xl`, `border-border`, **`p-8 sm:p-10`**, **`box-shadow: var(--shadow-card)`** |
| Primary | **`oklch(52% .045 145)`** sage (not olive) |
| Field focus | **`#59705926`** ring; hover border **`#cfceca`** |
| Title | **`text-[22px]`** semibold; subtitle **`mt-1.5`**, **`leading-relaxed`** |
| Forgot link | **`text-[13px]`**, **`hover:text-primary`**, **`-mt-1`** row |
| Submit | **`h-11`**, **`text-[15px]`**, **`tracking-tight`**, **`pt-2`** wrapper, **`disabled:opacity-60`** |
| Footer | **`mt-6`** signup line; **`mt-10`** copyright **`text-xs`** |

### What was wrong before

- Shell used **`bg-muted/35`** instead of **`bg-background`**.
- Card used **`max-w-md` (448px)** and **no** `--shadow-card`.
- Brand used **`tracking-[0.22em]`** / **`text-xs`** in places vs **`0.18em` / 15px**.
- **Primary on auth** had been tuned to olive globally; the export’s **`auth` surface uses sage** `52% .045 145`.
- Typography/steps for header, forgot link, and button didn’t match the snippet.

### What we changed (auth-only)

1. **`AuthChrome`** — Same structure as the export: `bg-background`, `max-w-[420px]`, `p-8 sm:p-10`, **`style={{ boxShadow: "var(--shadow-card)" }}"`**, brand margins/type, **`mt-6` / `mt-10`** footers inside **`main`**.
2. **`.auth-shell`** in [`globals.css`](frontend/src/app/globals.css) — Overrides **`--primary`**, **`--primary-hover`**, **`--ring`** to **`oklch(52% .045 145)`** + **`field`** focus **`#59705926`** and hover **`#cfceca`** (scoped so **dashboard primary stays olive**).
3. **`AuthPageHeader`** — **`mb-7`**, **`text-[22px]`**, subtitle **`mt-1.5 leading-relaxed`**.
4. **`AppBrandLink`** — Default **`text-[15px]`** + **`tracking-[0.18em]`** (sidebar still passes **`text-xs`** so it doesn’t change there).
5. **Login / signup / forgot / reset** — Aligned spacing, forgot **`text-[13px]`**, submit **`pt-2`**, **`text-[15px]`**, **`disabled:opacity-60`**, footer links **`font-medium`** + **`hover:text-primary`** like the export.

`pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` both pass.

So relative to your saved HTML, **semantic tokens and layout now match the export**; the only intentional split is **dashboard** still using the **olive** primary from `:root`, while **auth** uses the export’s **sage** primary inside **`.auth-shell`**.

content.text:
Here’s what was aligned to your **dashboard export** (`/dashboard` in the saved HTML).

### Shell & layout
- **`DashboardShell`**: `bg-background text-foreground` (replacing `bg-muted/40`).
- **`(dashboard)/layout.tsx`**: Content frame **`max-w-[1040px] mx-auto px-10 py-12`** — same as the export.

### Sidebar (`AppSidebar.tsx`)
- Width **`w-[240px]`**, **`sticky top-0 h-screen`**.
- Brand block: **`px-5 pt-6 pb-5`**, **`text-[14px] font-semibold tracking-[0.18em] uppercase`** (via `AppBrandLink`).
- Profile: **`border-b`**, avatar **`h-9 w-9`**, initials **`text-[12px] font-medium`**, name **`text-sm font-medium`** (not the old bordered card).
- Nav: **`px-3 py-4`**, links **`h-9 rounded-md`**, active **`bg-accent font-medium`**, inactive **`text-foreground/75 hover:bg-muted`**.
- Icons: **LayoutGrid**, **Upload**, **`ScrollText`** for audit; label **“Audit Log”**.
- Footer: **Logout** only (export also had **Settings**; there’s no `/settings` route, so it’s omitted to avoid a dead link). Logout is a **nav-style row** with **`LogOut`** icon, same hover behavior as the export.

### Programs home (`programs/page.tsx`)
- Title **`text-[26px]`**, subtitle **`mt-1.5 text-sm`**; welcome line **no trailing period** (like “Welcome back, Maya”).
- Stat cards: **`mb-10`**, **`px-5 py-5`**, labels **`text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.08em]`**, values **`text-[26px] font-semibold tracking-tight`**; **`grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3`** for small screens.
- **Your Programs** header: **`text-[15px]`**, **`px-6 py-4`**, **View all →** as **`text-xs font-medium text-primary hover:opacity-80`**.
- Rows: **`px-6 py-4`**, **`border-t`** from the second row onward; title **`text-sm font-medium`**, meta **`text-xs mt-0.5`** (session count only); optional description **`text-xs`** below.
- Primary action: **View** + **`ArrowRight`** (`h-3.5 w-3.5`), **`text-primary hover:opacity-80`**; **Edit** / **Delete** stay for real workflows.

`pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` both pass.

If you want a **Settings** row like the mock, say where it should go (e.g. placeholder `#` vs a real `/settings` stub).

[REDACTED]

input.description: Re-run ESLint after sessions layout tweak

content.text:
Here’s what changed to bring **Programs** and **Sessions** in line with the dashboard.

### Shared tokens — [`frontend/src/lib/dashboardUi.ts`](frontend/src/lib/dashboardUi.ts)
- **`DASH_PAGE_MAX`** (`max-w-2xl`) for form-heavy flows
- **`dashBackLink`**, **`dashPageTitle`** (`22px`), **`dashPageDescription`**
- **`dashSectionCard`** / **`dashInsetCard`** — `rounded-xl` + border, same family as home cards
- **`dashFormSection`** — padded form body with consistent vertical rhythm
- **`dashLabel`**, **`dashInputCn`**, **`dashTextareaCn`**, **`dashSelectCn`**, **`dashPrimaryLink`**

### Program flows
- **`programs/new`** — back link, title + short description, single **card** shell, inputs using dashboard field styles, footer actions with **top border**
- **`programs/[id]/edit`** — same pattern, **Sessions** stays as a secondary **sm** button in the header

### Sessions
- **`programs/[id]/sessions`** — full **content width** (so the list matches the `1040px` main column), refined header (**New session** / **Edit program** as `sm` buttons), optional **line-clamped** program description, dashed empty state
- **`SessionList`** — one **`rounded-xl`** list (no per-row boxes), **dividers** between rows, grip + **View** + arrow (same language as “Your Programs”), **Edit** / **Delete** on the right

### Session detail & forms
- **`.../sessions/[sessionId]`** — definition list with **small-caps-style labels** (`uppercase tracking-[0.08em]`), primary **Open media** link
- **`sessions/new`** & **`.../edit`** — card layout, grid for duration/position, **media** blocks in **`dashInsetCard`**, actions in a separated footer row; copy uses **sentence case** (“New session”, “Save changes”)

The **Programs home** (`/programs`) you already liked is unchanged aside from this system being available for future tweaks.

`pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm test` all pass.

If you want **Import** / **Audit** to use the same `dashboardUi` patterns next, say so and we can mirror this there too.

[REDACTED]
